briefdescription.para: Copy-assign member T into destination and mark alive.

parameterdescription.para: Component type
If true, uses atomic store for race-free lockless reads.

briefdescription.para: Copy-assign an opaque member using layout function table.

parameterdescription.para: If true, uses atomic store for race-free lockless reads.

memberdef.argsstring: (const std::byte *fromData, uint32_t fromIsAlive, std::byte *toData, uint32_t &toIsAlive, const SectorLayoutMeta *layouts)
memberdef.name: copySectorData

briefdescription.para: Copy sector data from one location to another.

parameterdescription.para: If true, uses atomic store for race-free lockless reads.
Source sector data
Source alive state
Destination sector data
Reference to destination alive state (will be modified)
Sector layout metadata

briefdescription.para: Destroy a specific member if alive and clear its liveness bits.

parameterdescription.para: If true, uses atomic store for race-free lockless reads.

briefdescription.para: Destroy all alive members in sector data and clear liveness bits.

parameterdescription.para: If true, uses atomic store for race-free lockless reads.

briefdescription.para: (Re)construct member T in place and mark it alive. Destroys previous value if present.

parameterdescription.para: Component type
If true, uses atomic store for race-free lockless reads.
Raw pointer to sector data
Reference to alive data (will be modified)
Layout data for this component type
Constructor arguments

briefdescription.para: Fetch component pointer of type T using layout; may be nullptr if not alive.

memberdef.argsstring: (const std::byte *data, const LayoutData &layout, uint32_t isAliveData) noexcept
memberdef.name: getMember

memberdef.argsstring: (const std::byte *data, uint16_t offset, uint32_t mask, uint32_t isAliveData) noexcept
memberdef.name: getMember

briefdescription.para: Get a member pointer using layout metadata; returns nullptr if not alive.

memberdef.argsstring: (std::byte *data, uint16_t offset, uint32_t mask, uint32_t isAliveData) noexcept
memberdef.name: getMember

briefdescription.para: Get a member pointer by offset if the corresponding liveness bit is set.

parameterdescription.para: Raw pointer to sector data
Byte offset of the component
Liveness bitmask for this component type
Current alive state from external array

simplesect.para: Pointer to T or nullptr if not alive.

briefdescription.para: Raw member address by byte offset from the sector data base.
Check whether any masked bit is marked alive.
Check whether any bit is marked alive (sector has any live component).
Move-assign member T into destination and mark alive.

parameterdescription.para: Component type
If true, uses atomic store for race-free lockless reads.

briefdescription.para: Move-assign an opaque member using layout function table.

parameterdescription.para: If true, uses atomic store for race-free lockless reads.

briefdescription.para: Move sector data from one location to another.

parameterdescription.para: If true, uses atomic store for race-free lockless reads.
Source sector data
Reference to source alive state (will be cleared)
Destination sector data
Reference to destination alive state (will be modified)
Sector layout metadata

briefdescription.para: Set or clear bits in isAliveData.

parameterdescription.para: If true, uses atomic store for race-free lockless reads.
Reference to alive data to modify
Bitmask of bits to modify
If true, sets the bits; if false, clears them

simplesect.para: When value == false, mask should already be ~mask

briefdescription.para: Namespace containing static functions for component operations within sector data.

detaileddescription.para: Sector is now a logical concept - a contiguous memory region storing multiple components. The metadata (id, isAliveData) is stored externally in SectorsArray for better cache locality.

External arrays in SectorsArray:
mIds[linearIdx] -> SectorId
mIsAliveData[linearIdx] -> uint32_t bitfield of alive components
